case_title: LAUREN ELIZABETH SEGAL VS. LIFELABS DESIGN, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SEGAL, LAUREN ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT LIFELABS DESIGN, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$25.00);AGENT FOR SERVICE: VCORP SERVICES CA, INC. "BY FAX" SERVED SEP-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIFELABS DESIGN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF LAUREN ELIZABETH SEGAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIFELABS DESIGN, INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATED TO ALLOW HER CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEGAL, LAUREN ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIFELABS DESIGN, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $224.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,224.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
